key_points: Kuwait hosts multiple US military facilities and remains exposed to regional strike risk.
Overland routes into Saudi Arabia are the primary evacuation option if aviation remains constrained.

situation_assessment.assessment: HIGH. Kuwait hosts multiple US military facilities and has experienced drone strikes targeting military infrastructure.
STABLE. Continued Iranian retaliation against US military facilities remains likely.
US military presence and geographic proximity to Iraq and Iran.
Drone attacks targeting US facilities and continued security alerts.
Continued threat of drone or missile attacks targeting military facilities.
Kuwait will likely remain a persistent target if US military operations continue.
KWI: CLOSED due to infrastructure damage and security restrictions.
Overland travel into Saudi Arabia remains the primary evacuation option.

airports.name: Kuwait International Airport
airports.notes: Closed due to infrastructure damage / security restrictions (per operator assessment).

borders.name: Saudi Arabia land border
borders.notes: Primary overland evacuation route; congestion possible.

domestic_unrest.notes: No widespread unrest reported; elevated security posture.

energy_infra.notes: Key infrastructure risk tied to regional escalation and base targeting.
